title: Salarpuria Sattva is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Salarpuria Sattva is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
